tbl_description: One row per zooplankton sample. source='unpooled' is a single night/day net tow with full position (line/station/site_key, lat/lon, datetime, depth, net type); source='pooled' is a per-cruise regional composite of n_tows_pooled night tows (Lavaniegos & Ohman 2007) with no per-station position. Unpooled tows resolve ship_key/cruise_key/site_key/grid_key against the shared CalCOFI reference tables; pooled samples carry only cruise_key + region. Source: ZooDB holoplankton export (oceaninformatics.ucsd.edu/zoodb), pooled=combined.

Holoplankton abundance and biomass in long form: one row per (sample, taxon, measurement_type). measurement_type is zooplankton_abundance (count/1000m3), zooplankton_abundance_areal (count/m2), or zooplankton_biomass_carbon (mg C/m2). A row's presence means the taxon was analyzed for that sample; measurement_value=0 means analyzed-but-absent. Coverage varies by taxon/cruise (Ohman & Smith 1995) — missing (sample, taxon) combinations are NOT analyzed, not zeros.

Higher-taxon lookup for the 33 enumerated holoplankton groups, with the verbatim ZooDB label, a taxon_slug join key, and the WoRMS-resolved aphia_id + accepted scientific name, rank, and kingdom..family classification. Counts are aggregated to this higher-taxon level (all genera/species and phases/stages combined).
